evals.prompt: Use the docs-workflow-writing skill: PROJ-123 --base-path .work/test-eval/proj-123 --format adoc
evals.expected_output: Runs build_writing_args.sh, gets JSON with mode=update-in-place and format=adoc, dispatches docs-writer agent with the update-in-place AsciiDoc prompt, creates _index.md manifest

assertions.text: The agent ran build_writing_args.sh to parse arguments and determine mode
The resolved mode is update-in-place with format adoc
The docs-writer subagent was invoked via the Agent tool
An _index.md manifest file exists listing written files
At least one .adoc file was created with complete content

evals.prompt: Use the docs-workflow-writing skill: PROJ-456 --base-path .work/test-eval/proj-456 --format mkdocs --draft
evals.expected_output: Runs build_writing_args.sh, gets JSON with mode=draft and format=mkdocs, dispatches docs-writer agent with the draft MkDocs prompt, writes files to staging area under .work/test-eval/proj-456/writing/

assertions.text: The agent ran build_writing_args.sh to parse arguments and determine mode
The resolved mode is draft with format mkdocs
The docs-writer subagent was invoked via the Agent tool
Files were written to the staging area under writing/docs/, not directly into a repository
A mkdocs-nav.yml fragment exists in the output directory
At least one .md page file was created with YAML frontmatter and complete content

evals.expected_output: Runs build_writing_args.sh, gets JSON with mode=fix and verify_output=false, dispatches docs-writer agent with fix prompt pointing to the review file, edits existing .adoc files in place

assertions.text: The agent ran build_writing_args.sh to parse arguments and determine mode
The resolved mode is fix with verify_output=false
The docs-writer subagent was invoked via the Agent tool with fix prompt
All kubectl references in the procedure were changed to oc
A prerequisites section was added mentioning cluster-reader permissions
No new files were created; existing files were edited in place
